necessityProof.blockerResolved: Four foundational governance reports still duplicated the same Markdown title/meta/section/list frame after the audit-store pair was migrated.
necessityProof.laterConsumer: N1 final acceptance can now treat access policy, CI evidence command, audit retention, and auth rehearsal reports as builder-backed before scanning compact command/document renderers.
necessityProof.reuseDecision: The shared builder owns entries and list sections. Source-less message rows and nested h3 sections remain local lines sections to preserve byte-identical output without adding single-use builder variants.
necessityProof.growthStopCondition: No new public helper was added. Reconsider only when multiple remaining renderers share an identical nested h3 grammar that deserves a tested shared formatter.

focusedRendererAndRouteBatch.command: npx vitest run test/accessPolicyProfile.test.ts test/auditRetentionIntegrityEvidence.test.ts test/authEnforcementRehearsal.test.ts test/ciEvidenceCommandProfile.test.ts --testTimeout=180000

byteIdenticalCompare.method: Temporary Vitest loaded each legacy renderer through git show HEAD:<path>, transpiled it in-memory with TypeScript, and compared safe/warning/enforced/file-backed profile variants against the migrated renderer.

archiveDeliverables.codeWalkthrough: 代码讲解记录_生产雏形阶段3/r2000/2109-renderer-consolidation-batch-21-v2138.md

crossProjectParallel.reason: v2138 changes only Node Markdown renderer internals and archive documentation. It does not change evidence schemas, routes, contracts, fresh sibling evidence requirements, or live integration startup behavior.
